title: Invalid credentials error after cloning n8n repo
symptom: After cloning the n8n repository and running it, the UI shows 'invalid credentials' when trying to log in.
not_this_if: Using a standard installation method without cloning
root_cause: When running a cloned version of n8n, the user credentials may not be properly set up or recognized, leading to authentication issues when accessing the UI.
fix_steps: Run the command 'n8n user-management:reset' in the terminal
If using Docker, run 'docker exec -u node -it n8n user-management:reset'
agent_instruction: Reset the user credentials using the provided command and restart the instance.
